_meta.note: Remote-federation target listing (P5 / FR-021). Read-only: enumerates the targets parsed from targets.toml (default: none = local-only) and probes each one's operator-forwarded LOCAL socket for liveness. Answers from adapter-side state, so it is NOT gated on local-daemon reachability and never returns a daemon_unavailable envelope. Constitution IV: reachability is probed over a LOCAL socket path only; no public network port is opened. Listing is read-only and not gated by allow_remote; ACTUALLY routing a tool to a target is gated separately on allow_remote + audited on the remote daemon.

invariants: default (no targets.toml) returns an empty targets array, never an error
reachability is probed over a LOCAL forward socket path; no public TCP port is opened
listing is read-only and not gated by allow_remote
